rstatic 0.1.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Catalogs

new_catalog() stac_init()
Create and initialize STAC catalogs

Collections

new_collection() stac_add_collection()
Create and register STAC collections

Items, properties and assets

new_properties() new_asset() new_item() stac_add_items()
Create STAC items, properties, and assets
stac_add_asset()
Add an asset to a STAC document
stac_add_link()
Add a link to a STAC document

Persistence

stac_save()
Save a STAC document to its canonical path

Spatial helpers

extract_bbox() as_geometry()
Spatial helpers for STAC documents

Styles and thumbnails

stac_style() qml_to_style()
STAC style objects for thumbnails
new_thumbnail()
Generate a thumbnail asset
plot(<doc_asset>)
Plot a STAC asset

Printing

print(<doc_catalog>) print(<doc_collection>) print(<doc_item>) print(<doc_asset>) print(<doc_link>) print(<doc_links>)
Print STAC documents

On this page

Developed by Rolf Simoes, Felipe Carlos, Felipe Souza.
